news.title: US stocks today: Dow Jones crashes 500 points at open as Trump stops Iran peace deal
news.description: Wall Street opened lower after Trump said the Iran deal was over, triggering a risk-off sentiment globally. Rising oil prices added pressure on equities, with Dow, S&P 500 and Nasdaq slipping at the open as investors reacted to geopolitical uncertainty and potential inflation risks.
